items_published.title: Anthropic Restores Fable 5 After US Lifts Export Ban

key_claims.claim: Jailbreak classifier blocks technique in >99% of attempts
Fable 5 in 50% of weekly usage limits through July 7 for paid plans

caveats: Mythos 5 global access remains more restricted than Fable 5 at publication date
Four-lab jailbreak severity framework is a commitment, not yet a published specification
Classifier effectiveness figure is vendor-tested only

items_published.title: California Extends Claude Access to All State Agencies at 50% Discount

key_claims.claim: 50% discount on Claude pricing for all CA state agencies and local governments
Access via California Department of Technology SITeS procurement portal

caveats: Whether discount applies to API usage or web-interface only not specified

items_published.title: Klaviyo Ships Composer Marketing Agent and Customer Agent in Public Beta

key_claims.claim: Composer draws on 14 years of customer data and patterns from ~200,000 brands
Customer Agent runs across web chat, email, SMS, WhatsApp via pre-built connectors

caveats: Human review step before campaign publication not specified in announcement
Customer Agent actions scoped to pre-built connectors; custom surfaces require API integration
No independent testing or performance data published

items_published.title: Microsoft Work Trend Index 2026: Indonesia's Advanced AI Workers Double Global Average
items_published.tier_nuance: Microsoft-commissioned survey by Edelman Data x Intelligence. Findings reflect self-reported AI usage.

key_claims.claim: 33% of Indonesian workers = Frontier Professional tier vs 16% global average
85% of Indonesian AI users concerned about falling behind vs 65% globally
Survey: 20,000 workers, 10 markets, Feb 18-Apr 7 2026, by Edelman Data x Intelligence

caveats: Self-reported survey; Frontier Professional is a Microsoft-defined classification
Survey window (Feb-Apr 2026) predates Fable 5 and Sonnet 5 releases
No independent replication of country-level findings published
